## What does this change?

<!-- A clear, concise description. Link the issue it closes: "Closes #123" -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] UI / design polish
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `swift test` passes
- [ ] `make app` builds and I ran the affected flow by hand
- [ ] New UI routes through the design system (`DS.*`) and follows the house style
- [ ] Looks intentional in **both** Light and Dark Mode (attach screenshots below)
- [ ] No placeholder / Lorem Ipsum copy
- [ ] Tests added/updated for any pure logic

## Screenshots

<!-- For any UI change, include Light + Dark screenshots. -->
